title: Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:TheDangerousRescueCover.jpg]] |title=''Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue'' |author=[[Jude Watson]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |cover artist=[[Cliff Nielsen]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[April]] [[2001]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0613357140 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice]]'' |preceded by=[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment|''The Evil Experiment'']] |followed by=[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind|''The Ties That Bind'']] }} '''''Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue''''' is the thirteenth in a series of young reader novels that chronicle the adventures of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] prior to [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. ==Publisher's summary==
'''Peace over Anger
Honor over Hate
Strength over Fear'''
''Murder. Kidnapping. Torture''. ''Jenna Zan Arbor will stop at nothing in her quest to discover the secrets of the Force—and use them for her own power and greed. One Jedi remains in her dangerous grasp. And a whole planet is being held hostage by her sinister plans.'' ''Only a single team of Jedi stands in her way….'' ==Plot summary== Together with [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] rescues [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon]] from [[Jenna Zan Arbor's secret laboratory|Jenna Zan Arbor’s lab]], but the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] escapes. Obi-Wan and Siri return to [[Sorrus]], where they tangle with vengeful [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]]. Their search leads them to [[Belasco]], where a [[Bacteria/Legends|bacterial]] outbreak in the [[Water/Legends|water]] supply threatens and oldest and youngest of the [[Planet/Legends|planet’s]] population. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] capture [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], who was behind the outbreak, engineered with the complicity of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Uta S'orn]]. ==Continuity== The final chapter should be numbered 21, but is numbered 29 by mistake. ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:TheDangerousRescueCover.jpg|Paperback File:JediApprentice_13_De.jpg|German - [[:de:Die riskante Rettung|''Jedi-Padawan: Die riskante Rettung'']] File:JediApprentice_13_Fr.jpg|French - ''Les apprentis Jedi 13: Périlleux sauvetage'' File:JediApprentice_13_Es.jpg|Spanish - ''Aprendiz de Jedi 13:
